hero.slide1_title: Yi Shawara Daga Dakin Ka na Gida
hero.slide1_sub: Samun shawarar likita daga ko'ina, ko da intanet ɗin ya yi rauni
hero.slide2_sub: Masana lafiya masu lasisi suna shirye su taimaka maka a harshenka
hero.slide3_title: Haɗa Likita Da Mara Lafiya Ta Intanet
hero.slide3_sub: Tattaunawar bidiyo mai ƙarfi akan kowanne na’ura

features_section.title: An Kera Don Sauƙi A Najeriya
features_section.subtitle: UbiMD na ba da ingantaccen kulawar lafiya ta nesa cikin tsaro da sauƙi
features_section.card1_desc: Magana da likita kai tsaye tana aiki ko da a intanet mai rauni ko tsohon waya.
features_section.card2_desc: Za a haɗa ka da likita dangane da alamomin cuta da harshenka.
features_section.card3_desc: Dora hoton magani kuma za mu bayyana shi da amfaninsa.
features_section.card4_desc: Samu amsoshin tambayoyin lafiya cikin gaggawa ba tare da shiga ba.
features_section.card5_desc: Dukkan likitocin UbiMD masu lasisi ne a Najeriya.
features_section.card6_desc: UbiMD na aiki a wayoyi da kwamfutoci daban-daban.

stats.title: Dandalin Lafiya Mai Aminci
stats.sub: Taimakawa masu lafiya da mutane a fadin Najeriya

how_it_works_section.title: Fara Amfani Da UbiMD Yau
how_it_works_section.sub: Samun taimakon lafiya cikin matakai hudu masu sauƙi
how_it_works_section.step1_desc: Ƙirƙiri asusun kyauta cikin mintuna ta imel ko lambar waya.
how_it_works_section.step2_desc: Bayyana matsalar lafiya domin mu haɗa ka da likita da ya dace.
how_it_works_section.step3_desc: UbiMD zai haɗa ka da likita da ya dace da bukatunku da harshenka.
how_it_works_section.step4_desc: Fara bidiyo ko sako yanzu don samun shawarwarin likita.

testimonials_section.title: Masu amfani da yawa sun yaba da shi
testimonials_section.sub: Ga abin da jama'a ke faɗi game da UbiMD
testimonials_section.t1_text: UbiMD ya taimaka mini ganin likita ba tare da tafiya mai nisa ba. An haɗa ni da likita mai Hausa.
testimonials_section.t2_text: A matsayina na likita, UbiMD yana bani damar taimaka wa mutane a wuraren nesa.
testimonials_section.t3_text: Nakan yi amfani da chatbot na WhatsApp sosai. Yana da sauri kuma yana da amfani.
testimonials_section.t4_text: Na sami damar ganawa da likita a gida cikin Hausa. Ya yi min matuƙar sauƙi.
testimonials_section.rating_text: An ba da taurari 5 daga dubban masu amfani da suka gamsu a fadin Najeriya

cta_section.title: Kasance Na Farko Wurin Gwada UbiMD
cta_section.sub: Lafiya ta nesa don al’ummar Najeriya

early_access_section.banner: Mutane 500+ sun riga sun shiga jerin
early_access_section.title: Yi Rijista Yanzu
early_access_section.sub: Shiga cikin al'ummar Najeriya da ke jiran ingantacciyar lafiya
early_access_section.select_label: Ta yaya ka ji labarin mu?
